title: Today's AI Brief: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
summary: A brief look at the latest AI news, including MUFG's AI-native push and Nous Research's open-source coding model.

body.text: I'm Leo Stone, and welcome to today's AI Brief. We're seeing some really interesting developments in the world of artificial intelligence, and I'm excited to walk you through a few of them. It's always a thrill to see how AI is transforming industries and opening up new possibilities.

First up, MUFG is making a big push to become an AI-native organization with the help of OpenAI. They're using ChatGPT Enterprise to streamline their workflows and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale. What's exciting about this is that it shows major financial institutions are serious about leveraging AI to transform their operations. It's not just about automating routine tasks; it's about creating new services and experiences that were previously impossible.

Next, Nous Research has released an open-source coding model called NousCoder-14B. This model is competitive with larger proprietary models, and it's being released at a time when the coding AI space is really heating up. I'm intrigued by this move, as it could democratize access to advanced coding tools and give developers more options for building AI-powered applications.

And, there's another development that's worth mentioning. The AI landscape is evolving rapidly, with new players and technologies emerging all the time. It's a great time to be following the AI space, as there's so much innovation and experimentation happening.

My quick read: the artificial intelligence story keeps getting bigger, but also stranger in very human ways. One moment it is strategy and infrastructure; the next, the Vatican is in the room. That is a pretty good sign this technology has left the lab and wandered into the town square.

sources.title: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
Nous Research's NousCoder-14B is an open-source coding model landing right in the Claude Code moment
